dj_text: If Midnight City (Medieval version) [Bardcore] was a warmup, We Built This City (Medieval version) [Bardcore] is the main event. If Midnight City (Medieval version) [Bardcore] was the main event, We Built This City (Medieval version) [Bardcore] is the hangover.
commercial_text: Attention all citizens of this fine shire!
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: We Built This City (Medieval version) [Bardcore]
